rows.label: qev041101_MSG0001
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_JNK0010
rows.name: Verify

rows.label: qev041101_SEL0011
rows.name: Check if Zazazan is alive.

rows.label: qev041101_JNK0020
rows.name: Vigilance

rows.label: qev041101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Do not touch the motionless Zazazan and
keep an eye on the surroundings.

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0002
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0003
rows.name: ...Are you [ST:playername ]-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0004
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Harvey and the others
have already gone somewhere-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0006
rows.name:
Zazazan was playing dead-mo.
Harvey and the others were completely fooled and left-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0007
rows.name:
...They are the absolute worst-mo.
They suddenly shot Zazazan from behind
and stole the cargo along with the Nopohippo-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0008
rows.name:
Please-mo! No matter what, I want you to
take the cargo back from them-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0009
rows.name:
If the contents of that cargo are used for evil...
It will turn into a total disaster-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev041101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask which way Harvey and his men fled.

rows.label: qev041101_JNK0040
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev041101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask what exactly is inside the cargo.

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0010
rows.name:
You're fired up-mo? You are so cool-mo!
Earthlings are all a bunch of outrageous people,
but you alone are different-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0011
rows.name:
It looks like they headed towards the cave up ahead-mo.
I think they are still there right now,
so I want you to go beat them to a pulp-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0012
rows.name:
I cannot say that-mo.
But... it is something necessary for Nopon like Zazazan
to survive on Mira-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0013
rows.name: Please-mo! Believe Zazazan-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0014
rows.name:
Zazazan is weeping tears of deep gratitude-mo.
They are armed with the weapons you gave them,
so please be careful-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0015
rows.name:
Y-you came back-mo!
Please-mo! No matter what, I want you to
take the cargo back from them-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0016
rows.name:
If the contents of that cargo are used for evil...
It will turn into a total disaster-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_JNK0050
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev041101_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask which way Harvey and his men fled.

rows.label: qev041101_JNK0060
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev041101_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask what exactly is inside the cargo.

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0017
rows.name: You're fired up-mo? You are so cool-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0018
rows.name:
It looks like they headed towards the cave up ahead-mo.
I think they are still there right now,
so I want you to go beat them to a pulp-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0019
rows.name:
I cannot say that-mo.
But... it is something necessary for Nopon like Zazazan
to survive on Mira-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0020
rows.name: Please-mo! Believe Zazazan-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0041
rows.name:
Zazazan is weeping tears of deep gratitude-mo.
They are armed with the weapons you gave them,
so please be careful-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0021
rows.name:
Harvey stole Zazazan's Nopohippo and
headed towards the cave up ahead-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0022
rows.name:
There's no need to hold back-mo.
I want you to beat them absolutely senseless-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0023
rows.name:
I'm glad you came back safely-mo!
...So, how was it-mo?
Were you able to get the cargo back-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0024
rows.name:
Phew... you saved me-mo...
If this cargo had been lost, Zazazan
would have suffered a massive loss-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Ah, also, what happened to Zazazan's
Nopohippo-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_JNK0070
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev041101_SEL0071
rows.name:
Explain that it sided with Harvey, so you
defeated it.

rows.label: qev041101_JNK0080
rows.name: Remorse

rows.label: qev041101_SEL0081
rows.name: Apologize for accidentally defeating it.

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0026
rows.name: Eh... you defeated it-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0027
rows.name:
It can't be helped, but... it's a bit of a problem-mo.
Zazazan can't carry such a large cargo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0028
rows.name:
Umm... if it's alright,
could you take it to NLA for me-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0029
rows.name:
You have to brush away falling sparks, after all-mo.
So, it can't be helped, but...
it's a bit of a problem-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Zazazan can't carry such a large cargo...
Umm... if you're feeling bad about it,
could you take it to NLA for me-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0031
rows.name:
It's important cargo, but I can trust you-mo.
So... you absolutely must not open the contents-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0032
rows.name: ...Do you understand-mo? Absolutely not-mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0033
rows.name:
Also... the elder's lackey, Roma,
might come asking about the cargo,
but I want you to play dumb gracefully-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0034
rows.name:
He's also a bad guy who is targeting
Zazazan's cargo, just like Harvey-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev041101_SEL0091
rows.name: Obediently accept Zazazan's warning.

rows.label: qev041101_JNK0100
rows.name: Suspicion

rows.label: qev041101_SEL0101
rows.name:
Feel distrust regarding the cargo's contents and
ask for details about the Nopon named Roma.

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0035
rows.name:
Unlike Harvey,
you are a very helpful,
sparkling Earthling-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0036
rows.name:
Roma is an attendant to the elder living in NLA...
He's a thief who is always keeping his eyes peeled
to snatch away Zazazan's cargo-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0037
rows.name:
If he finds out you have Zazazan's cargo,
he will try to steal it using all sorts of tricks,
so be careful not to be deceived-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0038
rows.name:
I'll leave it to you then-mo!
Just deliver it to Bodaboda at the Nopon Bazaar in NLA,
and your job is finished-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041101_MSG0039
qev041101_MSG0040
rows.name:
Make sure you deliver it properly to
Bodaboda at the Nopon Bazaar-mo.[ST:wait ]
